settingsToggleDescription: Track this campaign's official achievements as you play. Unlocks are recorded to your account and shown in the campaign log.

campaigns.50: Return to the Night of the Zealot

TheZealotsRevenge.name: The Zealot's Revenge
TheZealotsRevenge.text: Have Lita Chantler's reaction ability deal the killing blow to the Ghoul Priest.

IDontTrustHer.name: I Don't Trust Her
IDontTrustHer.text: When given the option to add Lita Chantler to your deck, refuse to do so.

InsuranceDoesntCoverGhouls.name: Insurance Doesn't Cover Ghouls
InsuranceDoesntCoverGhouls.text: Burn your house to the ground in The Gathering.

ButDoIHaveTo.name: …But Do I Have To?
ButDoIHaveTo.text: In The Midnight Masks, have each investigator remain in Your House for the first three rounds.

ConspiracyOfSilence.name: Conspiracy of Silence
ConspiracyOfSilence.text: Find and interrogate all six unique cultists in The Midnight Masks.

TourOfArkham.name: Tour of Arkham
TourOfArkham.text: Trigger each of the "once per game" abilities on all of the locations in play in The Midnight Masks.

DoYouGetItNow.name: Do You Get It Now?
DoYouGetItNow.text: Trigger the Forced ability on Billy Cooper by defeating the Ghoul Priest at his location.

PinchHitter.name: Pinch Hitter
PinchHitter.text: Defeat three Ghoul enemies with a Baseball Bat without it breaking.

EvenDeathMayDie.name: Even Death May Die
EvenDeathMayDie.text: Defeat Umôrdhoth while the Vault of Earthly Demise is attached to it.

BreakTheCircle.name: Break the Circle
BreakTheCircle.text: Complete The Devourer Below without Umôrdhoth spawning.

TheyreJustMisunderstood.name: They're Just Misunderstood
TheyreJustMisunderstood.text: Win the Night of the Zealot campaign without defeating a single unique Cultist enemy.

UmordhothsFavor.name: Umôrdhoth's Favor
UmordhothsFavor.text: Win the Night of the Zealot campaign without defeating a single Ghoul enemy.

ZealotLineInTheSand.name: Line in the Sand
ZealotLineInTheSand.text: Win the Night of the Zealot campaign with at least three Ultimatums active.

ArkhamExpertise.name: Arkham Expertise
ArkhamExpertise.text: Win the Night of the Zealot campaign on Expert difficulty.

WhatIsThisStuffAnyway.name: What Is This Stuff, Anyway?
WhatIsThisStuffAnyway.text: Defeat The Experiment using the Alchemical Concoction in Extracurricular Activities.

NoVoidForYou.name: No Void For You
NoVoidForYou.text: Complete The Miskatonic Museum without ever defeating the Hunting Horror.

FirstRuleOfArkham.name: First Rule of Arkham
FirstRuleOfArkham.text: Burn the Necronomicon in The Miskatonic Museum.

AllAboard.name: All Aboard
AllAboard.text: Complete The Essex County Express without letting any Helpless Passengers leave play.

TheGangsAllHere.name: The Gang's All Here
TheGangsAllHere.text: In The Survivors, have Dr. Henry Armitage, Dr. Francis Morgan, Professor Warren Rice, Zebulon Whateley, and Earl Sawyer all survive The Dunwich Legacy.

NoBroodLeftBehind.name: No Brood Left Behind
NoBroodLeftBehind.text: Have no Broods of Yog-Sothoth escape into the wild in Undimensioned and Unseen.

RemindMeNotToPissHerOff.name: Remind Me Not To Piss Her Off
RemindMeNotToPissHerOff.text: Defeat either version of Seth Bishop while Naomi O'Bannion is under your control.

BeyondWhatVeil.name: Beyond What Veil?
BeyondWhatVeil.text: Take 10 damage from Beyond the Veil without being defeated.

HereWeGoAgain.name: Here We Go Again
HereWeGoAgain.text: Have Dr. Henry Armitage, Dr. Francis Morgan, and Professor Warren Rice in play at the same time.

BirdHunting.name: Bird Hunting
BirdHunting.text: Defeat 3 Whippoorwills in a single turn.

TheyArentGettingAwayWithThis.name: They Aren't Getting Away With This
TheyArentGettingAwayWithThis.text: Win The Dunwich Legacy campaign as "Ashcan" Pete with Duke listed under "Sacrificed to Yog-Sothoth."

TabulaRasa.name: Tabula Rasa
TabulaRasa.text: Win The Dunwich Legacy campaign with no Tablet or Elder Thing tokens in the chaos bag.

DunwichLineInTheSand.name: Line in the Sand
DunwichLineInTheSand.text: Win The Dunwich Legacy campaign with at least three Ultimatums active.

DunwichExpertise.name: Dunwich Expertise
DunwichExpertise.text: Win The Dunwich Legacy campaign on Expert difficulty.

clearAllConfirm: Clear ALL earned achievements? This cannot be undone.
clearCampaignConfirm: Clear all earned achievements for {campaign}? This cannot be undone.
clearOneConfirm: Clear the achievement "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
